release.name: Chuyen phat hanh sang GitHub Pages va toi uu auto-update
notes: Bo GitHub Release khoi quy trinh phat hanh, chuyen sang dung GitHub Pages de public file tai ung dung va feed auto-update.
Them trang tai rieng chi hien thi nut tai setup.exe de nguoi dung cuoi khong phai xem cac asset noi bo cua updater.
Chuyen metadata cap nhat sang release.json tren GitHub Pages de ung dung van hien thi dung phien ban, ngay phat hanh va noi dung ban moi khi repo de private.
Toi uu trai nghiem update tren Windows: tai xong chi can khoi dong lai ung dung de ap dung ban moi.
